_comment: Per-role ordered server preference for the tiny animation models. First live server (GET /api/tags within probe_timeout_s, model tag present) wins; a daemon thread re-probes every probe_interval_s off the generation path. Add faster LAN machines ABOVE the localhost last resort, e.g. {"url": "http://beefy.local:11434", "model": "smollm2-135m-face-lora-34k:q8_0"}.
